title: ore vision
description: If you want a simple and effective pack that highlights ores without changing the overall look of Minecraft, this is the perfect choice.
body:
This resource pack makes ores much easier to see and recognize while mining.
✔️ Each ore has a more vibrant and clear texture.
✔️ Perfect for spotting diamonds, iron, gold, coal, and other ores quickly.
✔️ Lightweight and optimized, with no impact on FPS.
✔️ Great for players who enjoy caving and resource gathering.
